		<dheight value="0.000000"/>
		<dwidth value="0.000000"/>
		<angleX value="0.000000"/>
		<angleZ value="0.000000"/>
		<widthStiffness value="0.020000"/>
		<heightStiffness value="0.010000"/>
		<gustBendFactor value="0.010000"/>
		<breakable value="true"/>
		<pushable value="true"/>
		<removable value="true"/>
		<fadeOutRange value="250.000000"/>
		<fadeDistance value="10.000000"/>
		<screenSpaceFadeOut value="40.000000"/>
		<groundTintStrength value="0.000000"/>
		<castsShadow value="true"/>
		<useImposter value="false"/>
		<IsLargeTree value="false"/>
		<IsLeafyTree value="false"/>
		<colorTint x="0.100000" y="0.200000" z="0.800000"/>
		<tintWaveSize value="10.000000"/>
		<cost value="5000.000000"/>
		<useInstanceRenderer value="true"/>
